mainEntity.name: Cost of PT for ladder shoulder injury in Bountiful?
mainEntity.text: Cost of PT for ladder shoulder injury in Bountiful?

acceptedAnswer.text: 100% covered by comp; 12-24 weeks typical, $150/session but no out-pocket.

suggestedAnswer.text: Bountiful: Insist on evidence-based PT; deny chiropractic if ineffective. Transition to home program saves claim costs long-term.
